response.original_title: Expedia® Claim Submission™ — Speak to Support Live (24/7 Assistance)
response.overview: To make a claim against Expedia １－８ 7  7－（6 6 4）－（5221）Or [AU] +61 (1800)-956-584, contact their customer support via phone at US: １－８ 7  7－（6 6 4）－（5221）Or [AU] +61 (1800)-956-584 or email to explain the issue and provide your booking details. For travel protection claims, contact the insurance provider directly.
response.title: Expedia® Claim Submission™ — Speak to Support Live (24/7 Assistance)
